technical_competence.claim: Shipped a multi-skill agentic toolkit (skills + workflow + MCP server), authored once and run across three agent runtimes
Built a runnable MCP server exposing 7 callable tools to any MCP host

reliability.claim: Committed to a demo date and delivered a working, tested build on it
Every engagement milestone hit on the date I named

learning_agility.claim: Learned an unfamiliar low-code agent tool over a weekend and produced a working demo + a teach-back explaining it to a non-engineer

validated_reputation.claim: A client lead I worked with will attest directly; their team's phrasing was 'without this we're not running'
